name: ToyShop
description: Low-supervision software factory: Development, Maintenance, and Iteration pipelines with OpenSpec contracts

maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts for pipeline nodes

retryDelayBase.description: Base delay in ms for exponential backoff

defaultTimeout.description: Default timeout in milliseconds for pipeline execution

checkpointPath.description: Path to store checkpoints (relative to workspace)

architectureDbPath.description: Path to architecture database (relative to workspace)

openspecDir.description: Directory for OpenSpec documents (relative to workspace)

maxRetries.label: Max Retries
maxRetries.help: Maximum number of retry attempts when a pipeline node fails

retryDelayBase.label: Retry Delay Base (ms)
retryDelayBase.help: Base delay for exponential backoff retry strategy

defaultTimeout.label: Default Timeout (ms)
defaultTimeout.help: Default timeout for pipeline execution (10 minutes = 600000ms)

enableCheckpoint.label: Enable Checkpointing
enableCheckpoint.help: Save workflow state to allow resuming interrupted pipelines

architectureDbPath.label: Architecture DB Path
architectureDbPath.help: SQLite database file for architecture snapshots

openspecDir.label: OpenSpec Directory
openspecDir.help: Directory for OpenSpec documents (proposal.md, design.md, etc.)

sourceDir.label: Source Directory
sourceDir.help: Source code directory for generated code
